steps.title: Read the point values from the equation coefficients
steps.content: The equation $80S + 90C = 1120$ tells us that each square token is worth 80 points (the coefficient of $S$) and each circle token is worth 90 points (the coefficient of $C$). The difference between them is $$90 - 80 = 10$$ points. That matches choice D — D is correct.
